metadata.task_title: Search for a product on an online store
metadata.instruction: Visit walmart.com on Chrome. Search for a frying pan, then click on the first product with a pan size of exactly 10 inches and add it to cart.
metadata.context: I've been getting into cooking recently, so I've decided to upgrade my frying pan.

tabs.title: Cooks Standard Large Nonstick 10.5-Inch Kitchen Saute Skillet Omelet Pan, Black - Walmart.com

l3.rationale: Click the Google Chrome app entry in Program Manager to launch Chrome.

l4.rationale: Launch Google Chrome from Program Manager.

l5.rationale: The trace begins by opening the browser application to start the shopping task.

l3.rationale: Type the first character of walmart into the address/search bar.

l4.rationale: Use Chrome's address/search bar to search for Walmart, submit the query, and open the Walmart result from the search page.

l5.rationale: These browser search actions are used to reach walmart.com before searching for the product.

element_under_cursor.name: Paris Hilton. . Loves it!. All heart.. Shop now.

l3.rationale: Move the mouse over the product page content.

l4.rationale: Open the Size filter, expand the options, and select the 10-inch checkbox to narrow the product list.

l5.rationale: These actions narrow the Walmart results using a size-related filter to find exact 10-inch pans.

l3.rationale: Click the Size button to open size options.

l4.rationale: Open the Size filter, expand the options, and select the 10-inch checkbox to narrow the product list.

l5.rationale: These actions narrow the Walmart results using a size-related filter to find exact 10-inch pans.

l4.rationale: Select the first matching product card/link after filtering for 10-inch pans.

l5.rationale: The first matching product card is opened and the item choice is confirmed on the product page.
